indicators.name: Large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light to enter, reducing the need for artificial lighting.

indicators.name: White flooring
indicators.rationale: White flooring reflects light, creating a brighter and more open atmosphere.

indicators.name: Potted plants
indicators.rationale: Potted plants add a touch of nature but may require maintenance.

indicators.name: Stairs
indicators.rationale: Stairs can create a sense of separation from other areas, potentially disrupting focus.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for computer work due to its bright, open layout and natural light, but the presence of stairs could potentially disrupt focus.
